images.depicts: kindly grey-bearded vet in white coat, stethoscope, green cross sign
tabby cat sitting on vet table with one bandaged paw
wet/muddy curly-haired tan dog lying down, no cone collar, no clinical setting visible
images.issue: artNote calls for a BROWN dog wearing a cone collar on a vet table with hopeful tail wag; actual image is a wet, muddy curly-coated dog (looks like bath-time, not a vet visit) with no cone collar and no visible clinic/table — reads as 'dog getting a bath' not 'dog at the vet'.

images.depicts: grey rat close-up with bandaged tail, trying to look brave
red-shelled beetle upside-down on cushion under magnifying glass
white duck holding a blue-striped sock in its bill with a thermometer
single black ant on a table under a large microscope
nighttime ice-cream/food truck with awning and menu board, dog+cat figures nearby, no clinic visible
images.issue: artNote calls for a van parked outside the vet clinic window (green cross, warm evening reveal). Actual image renders as a food/ice-cream truck at night with an awning and serving window — no clinic signage, no green cross, doesn't read as 'at the vet' at all.

images.depicts: Sam (boy peg doll) and Segina (girl peg doll) in waiting-room armchairs holding pet carriers
potato character with round glasses and white coat holding a stethoscope/tool
cat (with beetle on head) sleeping on dog, rat tucked in, duck behind, Sam+Segina peg dolls beside, on a woven mat
small stylized cream-green delivery van, studio shot
wooden violin with bow, studio shot
dark ceramic vase with one large cream flower
small knitted tan vest with three buttons
leafy green climbing vine with dew drops
green upright vacuum cleaner with hose and wand
images.issue: minor: faint watermark-like text visible bottom-left/bottom-right corners of the image — cosmetic only, doesn't affect subject match.

images.depicts: small model volcano with a puff of smoke rising from the cone

V-v-vase! V-v-vase! It's a vase! (a vase!)
vvv… vvv… (the motor is ON) fff… (off) … vvv… (on) fan… van… fan… van…

wrong_art.issue: Shows a wet, muddy, curly-haired tan dog lying down — no cone collar, no vet table, no clinical setting. Reads as 'dog after a bath', not 'dog at the vet'. Cast's Dog is established brown; this dog's coat reads more tan/beige.
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate showing the established brown Dog wearing a plastic cone collar on a vet examination table with hopeful tail wag, per the original artNote/mjPrompt.
wrong_art.mj_prompt: a brown dog wearing a plastic Elizabethan cone collar, sitting on a stainless steel vet examination table with big sad hopeful eyes and tail giving one hopeful wag, clinical vet setting clearly visible, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.issue: Rendered as a nighttime ice-cream/food truck with an awning and serving window (plus stray dog/cat figures on the ground) — no vet clinic, no green cross, no daytime warm 'arrival' reveal. Does not read as 'van at the vet' at all.
wrong_art.fix: Regenerate as a plain small delivery/family van parked outside the established vet clinic window (matching vet.png's green cross signage), warm evening light.
wrong_art.mj_prompt: a small friendly delivery van parked outside a warm little animal clinic window with a visible green cross sign glowing in the window, warm evening light, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw
